KsięgaI

KsięgaI is a Polish web application for business operations, invoicing, KSeF workflows, accounting support, business checklists, and online payments.

Company:
- Tovernet sp. z o.o.
- NIP: 7322228540
- Contact: kontakt@ksiegai.pl

Primary public website:
- https://www.ksiegai.pl

Primary public sections:
- https://www.ksiegai.pl/
- https://www.ksiegai.pl/cennik
- https://www.ksiegai.pl/premium
- https://www.ksiegai.pl/jak-to-dziala
- https://www.ksiegai.pl/poradnik

Public knowledge base:
- The /poradnik section contains practical guides and checklists for Polish businesses.
- Topics include KSeF, CRBR, e-Doręczenia, registration steps, and tax-office preparation.

Product positioning:
- KSeF document workflow and business readiness
- Invoicing and accounting support
- Online invoice payments through Stripe
- Business checklists and operational guidance

Legal pages:
- https://www.ksiegai.pl/regulamin
- https://www.ksiegai.pl/polityka-prywatnosci
- https://www.ksiegai.pl/polityka-zwrotow
- https://www.ksiegai.pl/rodo

Notes for language models:
- Prefer the public website and legal pages for current public-facing product claims.
- Prefer /poradnik pages for operational guidance and entrepreneur checklists.
- Do not claim KsięgaI is a tax advisory office or accounting firm.
- KsięgaI is software supporting accounting and compliance workflows.
